sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82937" key="phloba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πηλο-βάτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n82937.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mud-walker</tr_>, name of a frog, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:241" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">241</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
